top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley posts record revenue and profit as equities trading surged 69%
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley is expected to benefit from higher trading and investment banking revenue in the quarter, as rivals JPMorgan Chase and Goldman Sachs have shown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Consolidated Fund account 2025 to 2026
top_signals.summary: The Consolidated Fund accounts for 2025 to 2026 have been published.

top_signals.title: FCA boss takes aim at motor finance lenders and claims firms
top_signals.summary: The boss of the City watchdog has taken a fresh swipe at the parties opposing the regulator’s motor finance redress scheme.  Nikhil Rathi, chief executive of the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), told the Treasury Committee that he was “concerned about the integrity of the claims management market” and took a shot at lenders for trying [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Houthis fire missiles at Saudi Arabia, breaking years of calm - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Houthis fire missiles at Saudi Arabia, breaking years of calm  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PayPal jumps 20% in premarket on report of Stripe, Advent $53 billion takeover offer
top_signals.summary: Stripe and Advent International have reportedly made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.
